name: Kol Nova - Appointment Booking
description: Webhook from Vapi → Create Google Calendar Event → Response 200

flow.label: Vapi Webhook Receiver
flow.description: Receives tool call from Vapi when patient wants to book appointment

config.note: Create a Custom Webhook in Make.com. Copy the webhook URL and paste it in vapi_config.json as MAKE_WEBHOOK_URL

flow.label: Create Calendar Event
flow.description: Creates a new event in Google Calendar with patient details

config.note: Connect your Google account in Make.com first

flow.label: Respond to Vapi
flow.description: Returns 200 OK with confirmation message so Vapi tells the patient the appointment is booked

results.result: התור נקבע בהצלחה ל-{{1.patient_name}} בתאריך {{formatDate(1.datetime, 'DD/MM/YYYY')}} בשעה {{formatDate(1.datetime, 'HH:mm')}}. אישור יישלח בקרוב.

setup_instructions.step_1: Go to make.com → Create new scenario
setup_instructions.step_2: Add module: Webhooks → Custom Webhook → Create webhook → Copy URL
setup_instructions.step_4: Add module: Google Calendar → Create an Event → Connect Google account
setup_instructions.step_5: Map fields as shown in flow[1].mapping above
setup_instructions.step_6: Add module: Webhooks → Webhook Response → Status 200 → Map body as shown
setup_instructions.step_7: Turn ON the scenario → Test with a Vapi call
setup_instructions.step_8: Verify: event appears in Google Calendar with patient details

daily_summary_scenario.name: Kol Nova - Daily Summary
daily_summary_scenario.description: Optional: Send daily summary of all calls to clinic owner
daily_summary_scenario.note: Build this AFTER first client is live. Not needed for MVP.
